summary: Phase 3 (Sistema de tareas automáticas por servicios contratados) testing completed successfully. All features working: POST /api/events/{event_id}/generate-tasks generates 62 tasks for 5 services, POST /api/events/{event_id}/recalculate-dates recalculates due dates, GET /api/tasks/{event_id} returns Phase 3 fields (servicio, fase, origen, disparador, offset_pct). UI shows tasks grouped chronologically by month with service color tags, phase badges, Auto badges, and all 8 filters working.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed (same as Phase 2)

passed_tests: Backend: Login with info@victoriaeventos.com / Victoria2024 - 200 OK
Backend: GET /api/events/cc024287-1485-4522-9d30-93dde8b821c4 returns event with all 5 services active
Backend: POST /api/events/{event_id}/generate-tasks creates 62 tasks (11 asesoria + 12 coordinacion + 12 decoracion + 11 carteleria + 16 proveedores)
Backend: POST /api/events/{event_id}/generate-tasks preserves manual tasks (18 manual tasks unchanged)
Backend: POST /api/events/{event_id}/recalculate-dates updates 62 automatic task due dates
Backend: GET /api/tasks/{event_id} returns 80 tasks (62 auto + 18 manual)
Backend: Auto tasks have Phase 3 fields: servicio, fase, origen='automatica', disparador, offset_pct (0.0-1.0)
Backend: Tasks distributed across all 5 services correctly
Backend: Due dates calculated within contract_date to event_date range
UI: Login flow works with test credentials
UI: Overview module shows 'Fecha del Evento' field
UI: Overview module has 'Generar tareas' button
UI: Overview module shows all 5 services checked (Asesoría, Coordinación, Proyecto de decoración, Gestión de proveedores, Diseño de cartelería)
UI: Tasks module shows '62 tareas automáticas generadas por servicios contratados' info bar
UI: Tasks module has all 8 filters (Todas, Hoy, Esta semana, Pendientes, Completadas, Vencidas, Esperando, Aprobaciones)
UI: Tasks module has 'Regenerar tareas' button - works correctly
UI: Tasks module has 'Recalcular' button - works correctly
UI: Tasks show service color tags (Asesoría=sky, Coordinación=violet, Decoración=pink, Cartelería=teal, Proveedores=amber)
UI: Tasks show phase badges (Inicio, Planificación, Seguimiento, etc.)
UI: Tasks show 'Auto' badge on automatically generated tasks (63 badges found)
UI: Tasks grouped chronologically by month (9 month groups found)
UI: Tasks show 'Disparador' info (e.g., 'Al contratar', 'Tras reunión inicial')
UI: '¿Qué hago hoy?' button opens dialog with top 3 priority tasks
UI: Recalculation dialog appears when event dates change
UI: Recalculation dialog has 'No, mantener' and 'Sí, recalcular' buttons
UI: Weekly Summary shows 'Progreso por servicio' section with 5 service progress bars
UI: Weekly Summary shows 'Próximas tareas de la Pareja' section with 3 pending tasks for Pareja
UI: Weekly Summary shows stats (8 Completadas, 6 Esta semana, 42 Vencidas, 1 Arch. pendientes)
UI: Filter buttons work correctly (tested Vencidas, Completadas, Todas)
critical_code_review_comments: All Phase 3 features implemented correctly per PRD
PLANTILLAS_TAREAS dict correctly defines 62 task templates across 5 services
offset_pct formula correctly calculates due dates: fecha_limite = fecha_contrato + offset_pct * (fecha_evento - fecha_contrato)
generar_tareas_automaticas function correctly generates tasks with all Phase 3 fields
POST /api/events/{event_id}/generate-tasks correctly deletes only automatic tasks (origen='automatica'), preserving manual tasks
POST /api/events/{event_id}/recalculate-dates correctly updates only automatic tasks with offset_pct
TasksModule.jsx correctly implements service color tags, phase badges, Auto badges, and chronological grouping
OverviewModule.jsx correctly shows recalculation dialog when dates change
WeeklySummary.jsx correctly shows service progress bars and Pareja tasks section
Minor: Dialog components missing aria-describedby for accessibility (same as Phase 2)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Comunion Leonor event with 62 auto tasks + 18 manual tasks
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 fully tested and working. Auto task generation creates 62 tasks from PLANTILLAS_TAREAS dict (11 asesoria + 12 coordinacion + 12 decoracion + 11 carteleria + 16 proveedores). Tasks have Phase 3 fields: servicio (service key), fase (phase name), origen ('automatica' or 'manual'), disparador (trigger description), offset_pct (0.0-1.0 for date calculation). TasksModule shows service color tags (sky/violet/pink/teal/amber), phase badges, Auto badges, chronological month grouping, and 8 filters. OverviewModule shows recalculation dialog when dates change. WeeklySummary shows service progress bars and Pareja tasks section. data-testid attributes: overview-generate-tasks-btn, generate-tasks-btn, recalculate-btn, que-hago-btn, que-hago-dialog, recalc-dialog, recalc-cancel, recalc-confirm, filter-{all|today|week|pending|completed|overdue|waiting|approval}, auto-tasks-info, service-progress, pareja-tasks, month-group-{YYYY-MM}.
